problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
